caption: A static graphic displays the logo and information for a company called VirtualShield against a solid, vibrant red background. The logo features a white shield emblem enclosed within a white circle, positioned to the left of the brand name "VirtualShield", which is written in a white, sans-serif font. Directly beneath the brand name is the slogan "You have the right to remain private." in a smaller white font. At the bottom of the composition, the website address "VirtualShield.com/Dronetek" is written in a larger, bold white font. This image remains entirely identical and unchanging across all frames, with no people, movement, or variation in the setting or on-screen elements.
